zh.lifeSummary: Guiscard de Charron II是Guischard Charron de Sabaudia, Cleric的兒子，於大約1242年出生在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾里士滿。他於1269年與Isabel de Horton在英國諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1297年在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Charron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Donat, Lucien, Marcel, Alphonse, Emile, Laurent, Normand, Renald, Yves, Adrien.

French: metonymic occupational name for a cartwright, from Old French charron ‘cart’ (from Latin carro, genitive carronis, a derivative of carrum ‘cart’). Compare Charon , Sharon , Sharron , and Sharrow .

History: Pierre Charron dit Ducharme from Meaux in Seine-et-Marne, France, married Catherine Pillard in Montreal, QC, in 1665; see also Ducharme . Jean Charron dit Laferrière from Saintes in Charente-Maritime, France, married Anne d'Anneville in Quebec City, QC, in 1669; see also Laferriere . Charles Charron dit Larose and Cabanac from Chartres in Eure-et-Loir, France, married Élisabeth Poupard in Montreal, QC, in 1713.

variants.name: Charon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jean-Yves, Francois, Valmore.
French: variant of   Charron   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

en.lifeSummary: Guiscard de Charron II was born about 1242, in Richmond, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Guischard Charron de Sabaudia, Cleric. He married Isabel de Horton in 1269, in Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1297, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

ja.lifeSummary: Guiscard de Charron IIは約1242年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアリチモンドでGuischard Charron de Sabaudia, Clericの息子として生まれた。1269年にイギリスノースウンバーランドでIsabel de Hortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1297年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guiscard de Charron II(은)는 대략 1242년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 리ch몽에서 Guischard Charron de Sabaudia, Cleric의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1269년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Isabel de Horton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1297년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Guiscard de Charron II родился около 1242 г. в местности ричмонд, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Guischard Charron de Sabaudia, Cleric. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Horton в 1269 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1297 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.
